caption: An older man with grey hair and glasses, wearing a blue button-down shirt, stands behind a light-colored wooden podium, speaking to a small group of people in an indoor setting. He is positioned in front of a large window covered by brown blinds and a red wall. Seated in the foreground, facing away from the camera, are several individuals, including a person in a plaid shirt and two people in dark blue tops. To the left of the speaker is a black speaker on a stand. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on a black rectangular background in the lower right area of the scene. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains at the podium, gesturing slightly with his hands as he speaks, while the audience remains seated and attentive. The camera angle and scene composition remain static throughout the clip.
